ghCliConsent.title: Read your repositories?
ghCliConsent.body: OpenShip can list your GitHub repositories using the gh CLI you're already logged into.
ghCliConsent.bodyWithLogin: OpenShip can list your GitHub repositories using the gh CLI you're logged into as @{login}.
ghCliConsent.pointNoCloud: Nothing is sent to the cloud — the list never leaves this machine.
ghCliConsent.pointDesktopOnly: Runs only in the desktop app, using your local gh auth.
ghCliConsent.pointReadOnly: Read-only: it lists repos so you can pick one to deploy.

page.title: New Project
page.subtitle: Import a repository, paste a URL, or start from a template

terminal.title: Connect GitHub
terminal.afterLogin: After logging in, click "Check Connection" to continue.

default.title: Connect GitHub to deploy
default.descSelfHosted: Pick how Openship reaches your repositories.
default.descSaas: Link your GitHub account to browse repos and deploy on every push.
default.cloudAppDesc: Deploy to remote servers with short-lived tokens.
default.ghCliDesc: Use your machine's GitHub login. No cloud needed.

folderUpload.emptyFolder: That folder looks empty (or everything was ignored). Pick a project folder.
folderUpload.stackDesc: Pick the stack for your folder — this sets the build environment. You'll upload it next.
folderUpload.uploadSubtitle: Packed in your browser — node_modules, .git and build output are skipped
folderUpload.dropTitle: Drop your project folder or click to browse
folderUpload.dropSubtitle: The whole folder is uploaded and built as a {stack} app

empty.title: No local projects yet
empty.description: Import a project folder from your machine to scan, build, and deploy it locally

form.title: Import from folder
form.dropTitle: Drop a folder here or click to browse
form.dropSubtitle: Select your project folder to auto-detect the framework
form.folderViaBrowser: Folder selected via browser - please enter the full absolute path and press Scan
form.folderDropped: Folder dropped - please enter the full absolute path and press Scan

repositoryList.installDesc: Install the GitHub App on your account or organization to grant access to your repositories.
repositoryList.noMatchingDesc: Try a different search term or adjust your filters
repositoryList.noReposDesc: This account doesn’t have any repositories yet
repositoryList.localOnlyTooltip: The Openship App isn't installed on {owner}. Local builds only — install the App on this owner to enable remote deploys.

sidebar.quickTipDesc: Select any repository to deploy it instantly. Configure automatic deployments on every push.
sidebar.footnote: Local library via gh CLI; remote deploys use short-lived tokens —

urlImport.invalidUrl: Enter a valid GitHub repository URL
urlImport.title: Import from Git URL
urlImport.description: Paste a public repository URL to import. No GitHub connection required.
